settings.heading: Privacy Policy
settings.intro: How Emporx collects, uses, and protects your information.

settings.content:
Last updated: 2026. This policy explains how Emporx handles your personal information. We recommend having it reviewed by a qualified professional for your specific obligations.

Who we are

Emporx ("we," "us") operates this online electronics store. For any privacy question, contact Alvaro.herard@emporx.com.

Information we collect

  • Information you provide: name, email, phone, shipping/billing address, and order details.
  • Payment information: processed securely by our payment provider. We do not store your full card details on our servers.
  • Automatically collected: device, browser, and usage data via cookies and similar technologies to operate and improve the store.

How we use your information

  • To process, fulfil, and deliver your orders
  • To provide customer support and respond to requests
  • To prevent fraud and keep the store secure
  • To improve our products, store, and service
  • With your consent, to send marketing emails you can opt out of at any time

How we share information

We share data only as needed to run the store: with suppliers and fulfilment partners to ship your order, shipping carriers for delivery, our payment processor to take payment, and analytics/marketing tools to operate the site. We also share information where required by law. We do not sell your personal information.

Your rights

Depending on where you live, you may have the right to access, correct, delete, or restrict use of your personal information, and to opt out of marketing. To make a request, email Alvaro.herard@emporx.com.

Cookies

We use cookies to keep your cart, remember preferences, and understand site usage. You can control cookies through your browser settings.

Data retention

We keep order and account information for as long as needed to provide our service and meet legal, tax, and accounting requirements.

Contact

Questions about your privacy? Email Alvaro.herard@emporx.com or write to Emporx, 2011 51st Ter SW, Naples, FL 34116, United States.
